name: x402node Geocoding Forward
description: Forward geocode: convert a street address / place name to latitude/longitude plus structured address components and bounding box. Backed by OpenStreetMap Nominatim.

usage.callShape: GET https://api.x402node.dev/maps/forward?q=<url-encoded address>&limit=<N> (x402 USDC on Base, $0.008/call). No request body.
usage.outputShape: query (string) · count (number) · results[] each: results[].lat · results[].lng · results[].display_name · results[].place_id · results[].type · results[].importance · results[].address{building,house_number,road,city,county,state,ISO3166-2-lvl4,postcode,country,country_code} · results[].boundingbox (string[4]) · _hint (string)
quirks: Registry/usage may say POST but POST returns 404 'Cannot POST /maps/forward' — you MUST use GET.
Address goes in the q= query param (NOT address=, NOT a JSON body). Endpoint reads the query string only.
Output uses lng (not lon) for longitude.
Results are wrapped in a results[] array; use limit=1 for a single best match (default may return multiple).
Fixed price $0.008 USDC on Base (8000 atomic units), payTo 0x4466d4A84b7c49a6A094ec6eef4a0712D6dd125e, asset USDC 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913.
boundingbox is an array of strings, not numbers (Nominatim convention).
No OpenAPI spec; schema only discoverable from the 402 challenge body.
usage.guide: Forward geocode: convert a street address / place name to latitude/longitude plus structured address components and bounding box. Backed by OpenStreetMap Nominatim. GET https://api.x402node.dev/maps/forward?q=<url-encoded address>&limit=<N> (x402 USDC on Base, $0.008/call). No request body. Output: query (string) · count (number) · results[] each: results[].lat · results[].lng · results[].display_name · results[].place_id · results[].type · results[].importance · results[].address{building,house_number,road,city,county,state,ISO3166-2-lvl4,postcode,country,country_code} · results[].boundingbox (string[4]) · _hint (string)

name: Google Maps Text Search (StableEnrich)
description: Search Google Maps places by free-text query (e.g. 'coffee shops in San Francisco'). Partial tier ($0.02) returns basic place fields; Full tier ($0.08) adds ratings, reviews, contact info and atmosphere data.

usage.callShape: POST https://stableenrich.dev/api/google-maps/text-search/partial with JSON {textQuery, maxResultCount} (x402, $0.02 USDC on Base).
usage.outputShape: places[].id, places[].types[], places[].formattedAddress, places[].location.latitude/longitude, places[].displayName.text, places[].primaryType, nextPageToken
quirks: Required field is 'textQuery' (NOT 'query' or 'q').
POST body, not query params (unlike place-details which is GET).
Two backends are the SAME op at different tiers: partial ($0.02) vs full ($0.08, adds ratings/reviews/contact). Default to partial.
Pagination via pageToken in body; response carries nextPageToken.
Defaults to excluding 'photos'; pass excludeFields:[] to include them.
Other optional body fields: includedType, languageCode, locationBias, rankPreference.
usage.guide: Search Google Maps places by free-text query (e.g. 'coffee shops in San Francisco'). Partial tier ($0.02) returns basic place fields; Full tier ($0.08) adds ratings, reviews, contact info and atmosphere data. POST https://stableenrich.dev/api/google-maps/text-search/partial with JSON {textQuery, maxResultCount} (x402, $0.02 USDC on Base). Output: places[].id, places[].types[], places[].formattedAddress, places[].location.latitude/longitude, places[].displayName.text, places[].primaryType, nextPageToken

name: Google Maps Nearby Search (StableEnrich)
description: Find Google Maps places near a geographic point within a radius. Partial tier ($0.02) returns basic place fields; Full tier ($0.08) adds ratings, reviews and contact info.

usage.callShape: POST https://stableenrich.dev/api/google-maps/nearby-search/partial with JSON {locationRestriction.circle.center.{latitude,longitude}, locationRestriction.circle.radius, maxResultCount} (x402, $0.02 USDC on Base).
usage.outputShape: places[].id, places[].types[], places[].formattedAddress, places[].location.latitude/longitude, places[].displayName.text, places[].primaryType
quirks: Required: locationRestriction.circle with center {latitude,longitude} and radius (meters). NOT a flat lat/lng.
POST body, not query params.
radius is in meters; circle (not rectangle) is the verified shape.
Two backends are the SAME op at different tiers: partial ($0.02) vs full ($0.08). Default to partial.
Optional body fields: includedTypes[], excludedTypes[], rankPreference (POPULARITY|DISTANCE), languageCode, excludeFields.
Defaults to excluding 'photos'; pass excludeFields:[] to include them.
No nextPageToken observed in the partial response (nearby-search returns a single page up to maxResultCount, max 20).
usage.guide: Find Google Maps places near a geographic point within a radius. Partial tier ($0.02) returns basic place fields; Full tier ($0.08) adds ratings, reviews and contact info. POST https://stableenrich.dev/api/google-maps/nearby-search/partial with JSON {locationRestriction.circle.center.{latitude,longitude}, locationRestriction.circle.radius, maxResultCount} (x402, $0.02 USDC on Base). Output: places[].id, places[].types[], places[].formattedAddress, places[].location.latitude/longitude, places[].displayName.text, places[].primaryType

name: Google Maps Place Details (StableEnrich)
description: Get details for a specific Google Maps place by placeId. Partial tier ($0.02) returns id, types, formattedAddress, location, displayName, primaryType; Full tier ($0.05) adds ratings, reviews, contact info, opening hours and atmosphere data.

usage.callShape: GET https://stableenrich.dev/api/google-maps/place-details/partial?placeId=<placeId> (x402, $0.02 USDC on Base). Optional query params: excludeFields (comma/array dot-paths), languageCode.
usage.outputShape: id, types[], formattedAddress, location.latitude, location.longitude, displayName.text, displayName.languageCode, primaryType (full adds rating, userRatingCount, reviews[], regularOpeningHours, etc.)
quirks: GET with placeId as a query param, NOT a request body.
placeId must be a real Google place id (e.g. obtained from text-search/nearby-search 'places[].id').
Two backends are the SAME op at different price/field-depth tiers: partial ($0.02, basic fields) and full ($0.05, ratings/reviews/contact). Default to partial.
Defaults to excluding 'photos'; pass excludeFields=[] (empty) to include photos.
usage.guide: Get details for a specific Google Maps place by placeId. Partial tier ($0.02) returns id, types, formattedAddress, location, displayName, primaryType; Full tier ($0.05) adds ratings, reviews, contact info, opening hours and atmosphere data. GET https://stableenrich.dev/api/google-maps/place-details/partial?placeId=<placeId> (x402, $0.02 USDC on Base). Optional query params: excludeFields (comma/array dot-paths), languageCode. Output: id, types[], formattedAddress, location.latitude, location.longitude, displayName.text, displayName.languageCode, primaryType (full adds rating, userRatingCount, reviews[], regularOpeningHours, etc.)

name: Tripadvisor Location Search
description: Search Tripadvisor locations (hotels/restaurants/attractions) by query; returns location_id + names.

quirks: Served via Sponge's x402 gateway (*.x402.paysponge.com) — a single x402 payment proxies the upstream provider. No API key. Base or Solana USDC.
usage.guide: Search Tripadvisor locations (hotels/restaurants/attractions) by query; returns location_id + names. Served via Sponge's x402 gateway (*.x402.paysponge.com) — a single x402 payment proxies the upstream provider. No API key. Base or Solana USDC.

name: Serper Maps
description: Google Maps search via Serper. Returns map listings with title, address, lat/long, rating, ratingCount, phoneNumber, website, opening hours, types, and cid/placeId. More detailed than Places.

usage.callShape: POST https://x402.orth.sh/serper/maps with JSON body {q (required), gl?, hl?, num?, page?, autocorrect?, location?, ll?}. ll = '@lat,lng,zoomz' for precise geo targeting. x402 payment on Base.
quirks: Orthogonal-only (no StableEnrich mirror for maps). $0.006, credits:3.
Body field is `q`. Use ll ('@40.7128,-74.0060,15z') for precise geo; richer than Places.
Returns full opening hours, phone, website, lat/lng, and cid/placeId per result.
Orthogonal schema only via x402 402-challenge probe.
usage.guide: Google Maps search via Serper. Returns map listings with title, address, lat/long, rating, ratingCount, phoneNumber, website, opening hours, types, and cid/placeId. More detailed than Places. POST https://x402.orth.sh/serper/maps with JSON body {q (required), gl?, hl?, num?, page?, autocorrect?, location?, ll?}. ll = '@lat,lng,zoomz' for precise geo targeting. x402 payment on Base. Output: searchParameters.{q,gl,hl,uule,type,num,page,location,engine}; ll; places[].{position,title,address,latitude,longitude,rating,ratingCount,priceLevel,type,types[],website,phoneNumber?,openingHours{},description?,bookingLinks?,thumbnailUrl,cid,fid,placeId}; credits

name: Serper Places
description: Google Places search via Serper. Returns local businesses with title, address, lat/long, rating, ratingCount, priceLevel, category, and cid. Lighter than Maps; cid feeds the Reviews endpoint.

usage.callShape: POST https://x402.orth.sh/serper/places with JSON body {q (required), gl?, hl?, lr?, num?, page?, autocorrect?, location?, ll?}. x402 payment on Base.
quirks: Orthogonal-only. $0.002, credits:1.
Body field is `q`. Lighter than Maps (no hours/phone/website); returns cid for the Reviews endpoint.
Orthogonal schema only via x402 402-challenge probe.
usage.guide: Google Places search via Serper. Returns local businesses with title, address, lat/long, rating, ratingCount, priceLevel, category, and cid. Lighter than Maps; cid feeds the Reviews endpoint. POST https://x402.orth.sh/serper/places with JSON body {q (required), gl?, hl?, lr?, num?, page?, autocorrect?, location?, ll?}. x402 payment on Base. Output: searchParameters.{q,gl,hl,uule,type,num,page,location,engine}; places[].{position,title,address,latitude,longitude,rating,ratingCount,priceLevel,category,cid}; credits
